title: Section 46
content: Whenever, after the commencement of this Act, any premises are constructed, the landlord shall, within thirty days of the completion of such construction, give intimation thereof in writing to the 1[Director of Estates] or to such other officer as may be specified in this behalf by the Government.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 58 of 1960, s. 3 and Schedule II, for "Estate Officer to the Government of India" (w.e.f. 26-12-1960).
